heading: General provisions
label: 9212 General provisions
notes: Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48

children.heading: Additional projects or activities
children.label: a Additional projects or activities
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as preventing the Secretary from undertaking projects or activities in addition to those specified in this chapter if such projects or activities appropriately further the purposes set forth in this subsection.1So in original. Probably should be “chapter.”1

children.heading: Application to States, territories and possessions
children.label: b Application to States, territories and possessions
children.text: This chapter applies to each of the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands and the territories and possessions of the United States including the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands.
